name: weibo-deep-profile-collect
description: 采集微博个人主页的全量信息，包括基础资料（通过$CONFIG.user）、全部微博、关注列表、收藏列表。
original_query: 采集微博个人主页的全量信息，包括基础资料、全部微博、关注列表、收藏列表
original_res: 成功采集基础资料($CONFIG.user结构化数据)、微博列表、关注列表、收藏列表。

steps.description: 导航到微博首页，用于提取$CONFIG.user数据

tool_params.jsScript: () => { try { const u = window.$CONFIG && window.$CONFIG.user; if (u) { return JSON.stringify({uid: u.idstr||u.id, screen_name: u.screen_name, description: u.description, followers_count: u.followers_count, friends_count: u.friends_count, statuses_count: u.statuses_count, favourites_count: u.favourites_count, gender: u.gender, verified: u.verified, verified_reason: u.verified_reason, avatar_large: u.avatar_large, domain: u.domain, profile_url: u.profile_url}); } return JSON.stringify({error: 'no $CONFIG.user'}); } catch(e) { return JSON.stringify({error: e.message}); } }

steps.description: 从window.$CONFIG.user提取当前登录用户的结构化数据（uid/昵称/粉丝数/关注数/微博数等）。这是微博页面内置的最可靠数据源。
导航到个人主页（微博列表页）

tool_params.jsScript: async () => { let prevCount = 0, sameCount = 0; for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) { window.scrollTo({top: document.body.scrollHeight, behavior: 'smooth'}); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const cards = document.querySelectorAll('article, [class*="card-wrap"], [class*="Feed_body"], [class*="woo-panel-main"]').length; if (cards === prevCount) { sameCount++; if (sameCount > 5) break; } else { sameCount = 0; } prevCount = cards; } window.scrollTo({top: 0}); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const weibos = []; document.querySelectorAll('article, [class*="card-wrap"], [class*="Feed_body"]').forEach(el => { const text = el.textContent.trim(); if (text.length > 20 && text.length < 2000) { weibos.push(text.substring(0, 200)); } }); return JSON.stringify({weiboCount: weibos.length, weibos: weibos, fullText: document.body.innerText}); }

steps.description: 滚动加载全部微博（智能停止：连续5轮无新增则停止），提取微博内容和页面文本。
导航到关注页面。⚠️ 必须使用/u/page/follow/{uid}格式（新版URL），旧格式/u/{uid}/follow会重定向到首页。

tool_params.jsScript: async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); for (let i = 0; i < 15; i++) { window.scrollTo({top: document.body.scrollHeight, behavior: 'smooth'}); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); } window.scrollTo({top: 0}); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const users = []; const seen = new Set(); const selfUid = '{step_2.uid}'; document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/u/"]').forEach(a => { const href = a.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/u\/(\d+)/); if (!m) return; const linkUid = m[1]; if (linkUid === selfUid || seen.has(linkUid)) return; if (a.closest('[class*="wbpro-side-card"]')) return; const infoDiv = a.querySelector('[class*="woo-box-item-flex"]'); if (!infoDiv || infoDiv.children.length < 2) return; const nameDiv = infoDiv.children[0]; const nickname = nameDiv ? nameDiv.textContent.trim() : ''; const descDiv = infoDiv.children[1]; const desc = descDiv ? descDiv.textContent.trim() : ''; if (nickname.length > 0 && nickname.length <= 30) { seen.add(linkUid); users.push({name: nickname, uid: linkUid, desc: desc.substring(0,60)}); } }); const totalMatch = document.body.innerText.match(/全部关注\\（(\\d+)\\）/); return JSON.stringify({count: users.length, displayTotal: totalMatch ? totalMatch[1] : 'unknown', users: users}); }

steps.description: 滚动加载并提取全量关注用户列表。通过a[href*='/u/']链接匹配用户，过滤自己和导航链接。

tool_params.jsScript: async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); let prevH = 0, same = 0; for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) { window.scrollTo({top: document.body.scrollHeight, behavior: 'smooth'}); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); if (document.body.scrollHeight === prevH) { same++; if (same > 5) break; } else { same = 0; } prevH = document.body.scrollHeight; } const favs = []; document.querySelectorAll('article, [class*="card-wrap"], [class*="Feed_body"], [class*="woo-panel-main"]').forEach(el => { const text = el.textContent.trim(); if (text.length > 30 && text.length < 2000) { favs.push(text.substring(0, 200)); } }); return JSON.stringify({count: favs.length, favs: favs}); }

steps.description: 滚动加载并提取收藏的微博列表。
